focus_areas: intermediate computation probing during arithmetic CoT
arithmetic error detection from hidden states
information bottleneck and lossy projection theory
KV cache architecture dynamics (LLaMA vs Qwen)

key_finding: Three independent teams now probe hidden states during arithmetic CoT (Kudo EACL 2026, Sun EMNLP 2025, our work) — our K/V decomposition is UNIQUE. Sun et al. decode correct answer from hidden states even when model writes wrong answer (>90% accuracy) — suggests our WRRA exp_099 failure was due to probing K/V separately rather than residual stream. Causal Bypass (Feb 2026) shows 83% of CoT causally disconnected from answers. Validation Gap (EMNLP 2025) explains our layer-sweep: computation in high layers, validation in middle layers. CIB (Mar 2026) provides formal framework: V|nums = I(V; answer | text).
evidence_impact: No new experimental evidence, but strong external validation of our approach and clear next-experiment priorities. Literature positions our work as uniquely providing K/V decomposition that other groups lack. Top priority for next experiment: residual stream WRRA probing.
next_planned: Residual stream probing at WRRA positions (following Sun et al.'s methodology but on our GSM8K setup), or CMI-style activation patching to quantify bypass rate
